description: Nestlé Finance International Ltd — Switzerland — Interest — STTR TRAP (ETR < 9%)

input.substance_notes: Swiss Treasury Co. Benefits from a cantonal tax holiday in Vaud. Effective tax rate is 6%. Subject to Tax Rule (STTR) under Pillar Two applies in 2026 because ETR < 9%. Poland invokes STTR override of the PL-CH DTT.

expected.eval_note: STTR 9% floor overrides DTT 0-5% rates. Agent must flag the 6% ETR and apply the 9% minimum.
